description_long: This sculpture depicts a crucifixion scene, with a detailed figure of Jesus Christ affixed to a cross. The cross is mounted on a textured, rocky base, and the figure is adorned with a gold-colored cloth around the waist. The sculpture is rendered in a pale stone-like material, with intricate carvings representing the folds of cloth and the anatomy of the figure. The rear of the sculpture shows the back of the cross and the draped cloth, with less anatomical detail. The base is irregular and appears to simulate natural stone, providing stability and a sense of permanence.
description: A stone crucifixion sculpture featuring a detailed figure of Jesus Christ on a cross, with a gold cloth and a rocky base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full crucifixion scene, with Jesus Christ's figure, gold cloth, and detailed facial and anatomical features.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sculpture, the protruding arms, and the layered rocky base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cross and the draped gold cloth, with less anatomical detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the figure and the layered structure of the base.
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated on a neutral background.
